title: Buying a House 买房咨询

lines.speaker: Buyer
lines.content: I am looking for a house with three bedrooms and a garden. Do you have anything in this area?
lines.cn: 我想找一套有三间卧室和花园的房子。你们这个区域有合适的吗？

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.content: Yes, we have a lovely house in a quiet neighborhood. It has three bedrooms, two bathrooms, and a small backyard.
lines.cn: 有的，我们在一个安静的社区有一套不错的房子。三间卧室、两间浴室，还有一个小后院。

lines.speaker: Buyer
lines.content: How old is the house? I do not want to deal with too many repairs.
lines.cn: 这房子多少年房龄了？我不想太多维修问题。

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.content: It was built ten years ago, but the previous owner renovated it two years ago. Everything is in good condition.
lines.cn: 建于十年前，但前业主两年前重新装修过。一切状况良好。

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.content: The owner is asking three hundred and fifty thousand dollars. It is negotiable.
lines.cn: 业主要价35万美元。价格可以商量。

lines.speaker: Buyer
lines.content: Can I arrange a home inspection before making an offer?
lines.cn: 我可以在出价前安排一次房屋检查吗？

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.content: Absolutely. I can schedule it for next Monday if that works for you.
lines.cn: 当然。如果方便的话，我可以安排下周一。

lines.speaker: Buyer
lines.content: Great. Also, is the school district good here? I have two kids.
lines.cn: 很好。另外，这里的学区好吗？我有两个孩子。

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.content: Yes, the elementary school is top-rated, and the high school is just five minutes away by car.
lines.cn: 是的，小学排名很高，高中开车只需五分钟。
